name: edtech-platform
description: EdTech Platform - Full-Stack Monorepo (React Frontend + Node.js/Express Backend + Supabase)

scripts.kill-ports: powershell -Command "@(3000,4000) | ForEach-Object { $port=$_; netstat -ano | Select-String \":$port \" | ForEach-Object { $pid=($_ -split '\\s+')[-1]; if($pid -match '^\\d+$' -and $pid -ne 0){ Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \"Killed port $port (PID $pid)\" } } }"
scripts.fresh: npm run kill-ports && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
